All right, welcome to the playbook. So we are going to be going over the entire overview of the playbook, what's inside of it, and how you can navigate it to get what you are looking for. So we're going to cover external plays, so plays that are marketed to cold traffic and internal plays. So marketing to your current customers and running challenges with your current customers. Okay, so this course will cover all the details about the challenge that you are running along with the resources that you'll need to run them. Okay, it is not going to cover sales of the challenges. So for sales training, you'll want to visit the sales course for how to generate those leads and build the systems for these plays. You'll need to visit lead gen and the tech course to build it. And for how to fulfill on the plays like the order and weigh-in days and all of that stuff, you'll need to visit the fulfillment course. But this playbook is just going over all the different challenges and themes and nutrition plans and resources and all of that that you could possibly run internally and externally. So we are going to start off with the external plays. However, it is very important to note that external plays can be ran internally. And vice versa, internal plays can be ran externally. Okay, we simply just split them up for ease of use and we included lead funnels for external plays because you'll be capturing leads. But if you wanted to run a six-week challenge or a 42-day detox to your members, you absolutely can. If you want to run a 28-day belly fat blast or a summer slim down to cold traffic and marketed and advertised for it, you absolutely can. We just split them up to make it super simple. So with that being said, let's dive right in.
